6:
WITH cust_total AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_per_seg AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM cust_total
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment, 'biggest' AS extreme FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
         SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
) ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, 'lowest' FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
         SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
) ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
